---
title: ""
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: margin=1.6cm
params:
  identite: NULL
  df_scores: NULL
  df_themes: NULL
  df_radar: NULL
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{fontspec}
  - \setmainfont{DejaVu Sans}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyfoot[L]{\includegraphics[width=1.5cm]{www/region-nouvelle-aquitaine_logo.jpg}}
  - \fancyfoot[R]{\thepage}
  - \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
  - \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.2pt}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \definecolor{bordeaux}{RGB}{128,0,32}
  - \usepackage{needspace}

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
id  <- params$identite
res <- params$df_scores
themes_glob <- params$df_themes
```

```{=latex}
% ====== LOGO À GAUCHE ======
\noindent
\begin{minipage}{0.25\linewidth}
  \includegraphics[width=3.5cm]{www/region-nouvelle-aquitaine_logo.jpg}
\end{minipage}
\begin{minipage}{0.74\linewidth}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.4cm}

% ====== BARRE BORDEAUX PLEINE LARGEUR ======
\noindent
\colorbox{bordeaux!20}{%
  \parbox{\dimexpr\linewidth}{%
    \vspace{0.35cm}
    \centering
    {\LARGE \textbf{Auto-diagnostic des transitions - Synthèse des résultats}}
    \vspace{0.35cm}
  }%
}

\vspace{0.5cm}
```

```{=Latex}
% Réduction de l'espace vertical
\setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
```

## Informations du répondant
**Nom :** `r params$identite$nom`  
**Prénom :** `r params$identite$prenom`  
**Structure :** `r params$identite$structure`  
**Email :** `r params$identite$email`  
**Fonction :** `r params$identite$fonction`  
**Co‑utilisateurs :** `r params$identite$co_users`

```{=Latex}
% On réserve l'espace exact pour la figure
\needspace{10cm}

% On force le bloc suivant à rester ici
\par\vspace{0.2cm}
```

```{r radar, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=6, fig.align='center', fig.env='none'}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

radar <- params$df_radar

# -----------------------
# Préparation des données
# -----------------------

n <- nrow(radar)

label_distance <- 145

radar <- radar %>%
  mutate(
    Theme = str_wrap(Theme, width = 24),
    angle = seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = n + 1)[1:n]
  )

# Polygone des scores
poly_df <- radar %>%
  mutate(
    x = score_pct_theme * sin(angle),
    y = score_pct_theme * cos(angle)
  )

poly_df <- bind_rows(poly_df, poly_df[1, ])

# Grilles polygonales
grid_levels <- c(25, 50, 75, 100)

grid_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(grid_levels, function(level){

    data.frame(
      level = level,
      angle = seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = n + 1)
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        x = level * sin(angle),
        y = level * cos(angle)
      )

  })
)

# Axes radiaux
axis_df <- radar %>%
  mutate(
    xend = 100 * sin(angle),
    yend = 100 * cos(angle)
  )

# Labels des thèmes
label_df <- radar %>%
  mutate(
    x = label_distance * sin(angle),
    y = label_distance * cos(angle),

    hjust = case_when(
      x > 20  ~ 0,
      x < -20 ~ 1,
      TRUE    ~ 0.5
    ),

    vjust = case_when(
      y > 90  ~ 0,
      y < -90 ~ 1,
      TRUE    ~ 0.5
    )
  )

# Graduation des pourcentages
tick_df <- data.frame(
  level = c(25, 50, 75, 100),
  x = 6,
  y = c(25, 50, 75, 100)
)

# -----------------------
# Graphique
# -----------------------

ggplot() +

  # Grille polygonale
  geom_path(
    data = grid_df,
    aes(x, y, group = level),
    colour = "#D0D0D0",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +

  # Axes
  geom_segment(
    data = axis_df,
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      xend = xend,
      yend = yend
    ),
    colour = "#D0D0D0",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +

  # Graduations
 geom_text(
  data = tick_df,
  aes(x, y, label = paste0(level, "%")),
  size = 3,
  colour = "#666666"
) +

  # Surface
  geom_polygon(
    data = poly_df,
    aes(x, y),
    fill = "#0055A4",
    alpha = 0.12
  ) +

  # Contour
  geom_path(
    data = poly_df,
    aes(x, y),
    colour = "#0055A4",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  # Sommets
  geom_point(
    data = poly_df[-nrow(poly_df), ],
    aes(x, y),
    colour = "#0055A4",
    size = 1.8
  ) +

  # Libellés
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x, y, label = Theme),
    size = 3.4,
    lineheight = 0.95,
    fontface = "plain"
  ) +

  coord_equal(
  xlim = c(-175,175),
  ylim = c(-175,175),
  clip = "off"
  ) +

  xlim(-145,145) +
  ylim(-145,145) +

  theme_void()

```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(xtable)
```

```{r resultats, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sanitize <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("\\\\", "/", x)
  x <- gsub("[\n\r]", " ", x)
  return(x)
}

barre_latex <- function(score) {
  filled <- score / 100 * 6
  empty  <- 6 - filled

  col <- if (score >= 80) {
    "49CC2B"
  } else if (score >= 50) {
    "6E9E62"
  } else if (score >= 20) {
    "EB6E26"
  } else {
    "CC1414"
  }
  
  paste0(
    "{\\color[HTML]{", col, "}\\rule{", round(filled, 2), "cm}{3pt}}",
    "{\\color{gray}\\rule{", round(empty, 2), "cm}{3pt}}",
    "\\hspace{0.3cm}", score, "\\%"
  )
}

themes <- unique(res$Theme)

for (th in themes) {

  # Il faut ~8cm libres sinon on saute de page
  cat("\\needspace{8cm}\n")

  cat("\\vspace{0.8cm}\n")
  
  d <- res[res$Theme == th, c("Objectif", "score_pct_objectif")]
  colnames(d) <- c("Objectif", "Score")

  score_ambition <- themes_glob$score_pct_theme[themes_glob$Theme == th]


  cat(
    "\\textbf{\\fontsize{10pt}{12pt}\\selectfont Ambition ",
    sanitize(th),
    "} \\hfill \\small Score : ",
    score_ambition,
    "\\%\n\n",
    sep = ""
    )

    if (nrow(d) > 0) {

    d$Objectif <- sanitize(d$Objectif)
    d$Barre <- sapply(d$Score, barre_latex)

    cat("\\begin{center}\n")
    cat("\\begin{tabular}{p{10cm}c}\n")
    cat("\\toprule\n")
    cat("Objectifs & Score \\\\\n")
    cat("\\midrule\n")

    for (i in 1:nrow(d)) {
      cat(d$Objectif[i], " & ", d$Barre[i], " \\\\\n", sep = "")
    }

    cat("\\bottomrule\n")
    cat("\\end{tabular}\n")
    cat("\\end{center}\n\n")

  } else {
    cat("Aucun objectif pour ce thème.\n\n")
  }
}

```
